title: Login page not loading
description: Users report a blank screen when accessing the login page from Chrome browser.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions fail intermittently due to timeout errors from the payment provider.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Customer profile changes are not persisting after clicking save.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: System email notifications are delayed by 20–30 minutes.

title: Dashboard charts not rendering
description: Analytics charts fail to load on the admin dashboard.

title: Incorrect invoice total
description: Generated invoices show incorrect tax calculations.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Product search takes more than 10 seconds to return results.

title: Mobile layout broken on iOS
description: UI elements overlap on Safari browser for iPhone 13.

title: API returning 500 error
description: Internal server error when fetching order history via API.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link expires immediately after generation.

title: Data export missing columns
description: CSV export does not include customer phone numbers.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity.

title: File upload failing
description: PDF uploads larger than 5MB fail without error message.

title: Two-factor authentication error
description: Users receive invalid OTP error despite entering correct code.

title: Broken link in footer
description: Privacy Policy link in the footer leads to a 404 page.
